name: STERIS plc
summary: STERIS plc is a leading global provider of products and services supporting patient care with an emphasis on infection prevention. The company offers consumable products (detergents, endoscopy accessories, barrier products, instruments), capital equipment (sterilizers, surgical tables, automated endoscope reprocessors), and services (equipment maintenance, microbial reduction of medical devices, instrument repair, laboratory testing, outsourced reprocessing). STERIS operates three segments: Healthcare, Applied Sterilization Technologies (AST), and Life Sciences, serving healthcare providers, medical device manufacturers, and biopharmaceutical companies worldwide.

products.name: Cleaning Chemistries and Sterility Assurance Products
products.description: Consumable products for sterile processing departments including detergents and sterility assurance items.

products.name: Automated Endoscope Reprocessing Systems
products.description: Capital equipment for automated reprocessing and tracking of endoscopes.

products.name: Sterilizers and Washers
products.description: Capital equipment essential to sterile processing departments for healthcare and life sciences customers.

products.name: Surgical Tables and Lights
products.description: Procedural room equipment including surgical tables, lights, and equipment management services.

products.name: OR Connectivity Solutions
products.description: Operating room integration and connectivity solutions for procedural centers.

products.name: Vaporized Hydrogen Peroxide Room Decontamination Systems
products.description: Decontamination systems and sterilizers for life sciences and pharmaceutical manufacturing facilities.

products.name: High Purity Water and Pure Steam Generators
products.description: Equipment for pharmaceutical and biopharmaceutical manufacturing facilities requiring high purity water.

products.name: Integrated Sterilization Equipment and Control Systems
products.description: Sterilization equipment including accelerators, product handling, and automation for medical device manufacturers.

products.name: Pharmaceutical Detergents and Cleanroom Disinfectants
products.description: Consumable products including pharmaceutical detergents, cleanroom disinfectants, and sterilants for life sciences customers.

products.name: Contract Sterilization Services
products.description: Global network of contract sterilization facilities offering multiple sterilization modalities for medical device and pharmaceutical manufacturers.

products.name: Laboratory Testing Services
products.description: Testing services supporting medical device and pharmaceutical manufacturers through materials testing and process validation.

products.name: Instrument and Scope Repair Services
products.description: Repair and maintenance services for instruments, devices, and endoscopes, on-site or at dedicated facilities.

products.name: Outsourced Instrument Reprocessing Services
products.description: On-site and off-site outsourced sterile instrument reprocessing services for healthcare customers.

products.name: Endoscopy Accessories and Instruments
products.description: Consumable endoscopy accessories and instruments used in operating rooms, ambulatory surgery centers, and endoscopy suites.
